content: The iterative search-inference structure of open-ended agent knowledge discovery can be reframed as an episodic memory buffer for a neural architecture planning agent, where each incomplete partial search result is stored as a distinct episodic trace that guides future curiosity-driven active learning exploration. This structure turns incomplete, scattered existing knowledge about agents into a structured planning context instead of discarding it as noise.
source_topics: neural architecture memory episodic planning agent
trigger_topic: neural architecture memory episodic planning agent
